goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and should be in the 'centre'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should go to 'bishops stortford' and should 'leave after 16:00'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should be in the centre
The hotel should include free wifi
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
The train should go to bishops stortford and should leave after 16:00
Make sure you get train ID
